🎓 Student Quiz
🛒 Vocabulary & Language Quiz

Shopping for
a Picnic

هذا الاختبار خاص بطلاب مستر صلاح هواري — الصف الرابع الابتدائي | الوحدة الثالثة | الدرس الثاني

📖 ملخص الدرس — Shopping for a Picnic

🛒 Key Vocabulary — المفردات الأساسية

a carton of milk  |  a bar of chocolate  |  a pack of biscuits

a slice of bread  |  a bottle of orange juice  |  a piece of cheese  |  a kilo of apples

📌 Countable vs Uncountable Nouns

Countable → a / an / numbers   |   Uncountable → some / any

an apple ✓  |  a pen ✓  |  rice ✗ (no a/an)  |  milk ✗ (no a/an)

📌 Some / Any

Some → إثبات وطلب   |   Any → نفي واستفهام

I have some oranges.  |  I don't have any water.  |  Do you have any sugar?

📌 How many ...?

How many + plural noun + ...?

How many lemons do we need? — Five lemons.
